channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PROMAX] Promax Power Clarifies Share Price Movement Unrelated to Company Operations
item.description:
Promax Power Ltd has clarified that all material information, including price sensitive information, has been disclosed within the stipulated time as per SEBI regulations. There are no pending announcements that could affect the price behavior of the scrip. The company will continue to make applicable disclosures as required. The movement in the share price is attributed to market conditions and is not connected to the company's management in any way.

  • Promax Power has always disclosed material information within the stipulated time
  • There are no pending announcements that could affect the scrip's price behavior
  • The company will continue to make required disclosures
  • Share price movement is attributed to market conditions
  • Company management is not connected to the share price movement

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Promax Power Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CORALAB] Coral Laboratories Ltd. Re-appoints Malay Doshi as Independent Director for Second Term
item.description:
Coral Laboratories Ltd. has re-appointed Mr. Malay Doshi as an Independent Director for a second term of 5 consecutive years, from May 27, 2026 to May 26, 2031. The decision was made during the Board of Directors meeting held on April 2, 2026. Mr. Doshi is the owner of Malay Doshi & Associates, a renowned professional firm offering a wide range of services including Audit and Assurance, Income Tax, Goods and Service Tax, and Financial and Investment Consultancy. He is a Chartered Accountant and holds a Bachelor of Laws degree. He is not related to any directors, KMP, or Promoter of the company and is not debarred from holding the office of Director by any SEBI Order or other such authority.

  • Re-appointment of Mr. Malay Doshi as Independent Director for a second term
  • Mr. Doshi's term extending from May 27, 2026 to May 26, 2031
  • Mr. Doshi is the owner of Malay Doshi & Associates
  • Mr. Doshi is a Chartered Accountant and holds a Bachelor of Laws degree
  • Mr. Doshi is not related to any directors, KMP, or Promoter of the company and is not debarred from holding the office of Director by any SEBI Order or other such authority

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CORAL LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MANALIPETC] Manali Petrochemicals Wins Customs Duty Dispute, Saving Rs. 3.83 Crore
item.description:
Manali Petrochemicals Ltd. has won a customs duty dispute, with the Customs, Excise, and Service Tax Appellate Tribunal (CESTAT) setting aside a demand of Rs. 3.83 crore. The dispute was regarding the import of Quicklime, which was allegedly misclassified under CTI 2825 9090 instead of CTI 2522 1000. The Tribunal upheld the Company's classification under CTI 2522 1000, as the Calcium Oxide purity of the imported goods ranged between 91%–95%, below the 98% threshold required for classification under CTI 2825 9090. The Company is currently assessing the financial impact and will take appropriate steps as applicable. They will also keep the Stock Exchanges informed of any further material developments.

  • Manali Petrochemicals wins customs duty dispute
  • CESTAT sets aside demand of Rs. 3.83 crore
  • Dispute over import of Quicklime misclassification
  • Calcium Oxide purity below 98% threshold
  • Company assessing financial impact

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MANALI PETROCHEMICAL LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [RATEGAIN] RateGain Partners with Razorpay as Platinum Partner for RG Pay to Power High-Conversion Checkout Experiences for Global Travel Brands
item.description:
RateGain Travel Technologies Limited, a global leader in AI-powered SaaS solutions for the travel and hospitality industry, has announced a strategic partnership with Razorpay, India’s omnichannel payments platform for businesses. The partnership aims to improve payment outcomes at the final step of booking for travel brands by bringing Razorpay’s payment gateway and processing capabilities into RateGain’s unified technology infrastructure, RG Pay. This will enable travel brands to offer locally preferred payment options, reduce friction during checkout, and improve booking completion rates. The partnership will help travel companies adapt to varying payment behaviors across regions while maintaining performance and reliability at scale.

  • RateGain has partnered with Razorpay as a Platinum Partner for RG Pay to improve payment outcomes for travel brands.
  • RG Pay will bring Razorpay’s payment gateway and processing capabilities to offer locally preferred payment options and reduce friction during checkout.
  • The partnership aims to help travel companies adapt to varying payment behaviors across regions and maintain performance and reliability at scale.
  • RG Pay offers adaptive checkout experiences, affordability options, virtual card (VCC) enablement, and cross-border settlement capabilities.
  • The partnership will enable travel and hospitality brands to deliver more consistent and dependable payment experiences as they scale across markets with varying payment preferences.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RateGain Travel Technologies Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [CAPILLARY] Capillary Technologies Appoints Sumit Kumar as President of The Middle East, Africa & India
item.description:
Capillary Technologies, a global leader in loyalty technology solutions, has appointed Sumit Kumar as President of the Middle East, Africa & India. With over 28 years of experience in enterprise sales and customer success, Sumit will lead Capillary’s sales organization across the Middle East, Africa, and India, driving enterprise adoption of its award-winning loyalty platform and expanding client partnerships across key markets. His appointment reflects Capillary’s commitment to deepening client relationships and driving growth in one of its most strategic markets.

  • Capillary Technologies appoints Sumit Kumar as President of the Middle East, Africa & India
  • Sumit Kumar brings over 28 years of experience in enterprise sales and customer success
  • He will lead Capillary’s sales organization across the Middle East, Africa, and India
  • His appointment reflects Capillary’s commitment to deepening client relationships and driving growth in the MEA & India region
  • Sumit has consistently delivered strong revenue growth and built enduring partnerships across diverse industries

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Capillary Technologies India Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GODREJIND] Godrej Industries Confirms Compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations
item.description:
Godrej Industries Limited, in response to an email communication from BSE on April 2, 2026, has confirmed its compliance with disclosure obligations under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The company has been promptly disseminating events or information that could have an impact on the price or volume of the company's shares, and has been submitting mandatory disclosures under the aforementioned regulations from time to time.

  • Godrej Industries confirms compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations
  • Company has been promptly disseminating events or information that could have an impact on the price or volume of the company's shares
  • Godrej Industries has been submitting mandatory disclosures under SEBI Listing Regulations and SEBI PIT Regulations from time to time

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GODREJ INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [KSE] KSE Ltd Promoter Dony Akkarakaran George Declares No Encumbrance of Shares in FY 2025-2026
item.description:
KSE Ltd, in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, has disclosed that its Promoter, Mr. Dony Akkarakaran George, and the Promoter & Promoter Group have not made any encumbrance of shares, directly or indirectly, during the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made under Regulation 31(4) of the aforementioned regulations.

  • KSE Ltd has made a disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The disclosure was made for the financial year ended on March 31, 2026.
  • Mr. Dony Akkarakaran George, the Promoter of KSE Ltd, made the disclosure on behalf of the Promoter & Promoter Group of the company.
  • No encumbrance of shares, directly or indirectly, was made by the Promoter or the Promoter & Promoter Group during the financial year.
  • The disclosure is in compliance with the SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KSE LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PONDYOXIDE] Sad Demise of Mr. Anil Kumar Bansal, Promoter, Chairman and Whole-time Director of Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd
item.description:
Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd regretfully announces the demise of Mr. Anil Kumar Bansal, Promoter, Chairman and Whole-time Director of the Company on 1st April 2026. His passing away is an irreplaceable loss to the Company. The Board of Directors express their deep sympathy, sorrow, and condolences to his family. They are proud of his hard work and dedication throughout his tenure and are inspired by his legacy. His values and contribution will continue to guide the Company. The Company deeply mourns the loss of its Chairman.

  • Mr. Anil Kumar Bansal, Promoter, Chairman and Whole-time Director of Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd, passed away on 1st April 2026.
  • His demise is an irreparable loss to the Company.
  • The Board of Directors convey deep sympathy, sorrow, and condolences to his family.
  • The Board is proud of his hard work and dedication throughout his tenure.
  • His values and contribution will continue to guide the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PONDY OXIDES & CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GPSL] Gabriel Pet Straps Ltd Closes Trading Window Until 48 Hours After FY2025-26 Financial Results
item.description:
Gabriel Pet Straps Limited has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the listed and proposed to be listed securities from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the financial year ending on March 31, 2026. The Board meeting to consider and approve the financial results will be informed later. Connected and designated persons are advised not to trade in the Company's securities during the closure of the trading window.

  • Trading window for Gabriel Pet Straps Limited securities closed from April 01, 2026
  • Closure continues until 48 hours after FY2025-26 financial results declaration
  • Board meeting to consider and approve financial results to be informed later
  • Connected and designated persons advised not to trade in the Company's securities during the closure

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gabriel Pet Straps Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [STYLEBAAZA] Baazar Style Retail Ltd Reports Highest-Ever Revenue in FY26, 37% YoY Growth
item.description:
Baazar Style Retail Limited (BSRL), a leading value fashion retailer in Eastern India, has reported its business update for the Fourth Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. The company recorded its highest-ever standalone revenue from operations in FY26, registering a robust YoY growth of 37% to Rs 18,421 Mn. The standalone revenue from operations in Q4FY26 grew by 35% YoY to Rs 4,662 Mn. The sales per square feet (PSF) stood at Rs 731 per month in FY26 and Rs 698 per month in Q4FY26. The same store sales growth (SSSG) stood at 3% in FY26 and 8% in Q4FY26. As of March 31, 2026, the company operated 263 stores with a total rental area of 24.53 Lakh Sq Ft. The company opened 11 new stores and did not close any stores in Q4 FY26. The revenue from operations for Q4FY26 and FY26 are subject to limited review/audited by the Statutory Auditors of the Company.

  • Highest-ever standalone revenue from operations in FY26, registering a robust YoY growth of 37% to Rs 18,421 Mn
  • Standalone Revenue from Operations posted a healthy growth of 35% YoY to Rs 4,662 Mn in Q4FY26
  • Sales Per Square Feet (PSF) stood at Rs 731 per month in FY26 and Rs 698 per month in Q4FY26
  • Same Store Sales Growth (SSSG) stood at 3% in FY26 and 8% in Q4FY26
  • During Q4 FY26, the Company opened 11 new stores and did not close any stores

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Baazar Style Retail Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
